evals.prompt: Add a new ember ring that grants a tuned fire spell and uses the existing fire school.
evals.expected_output: Keeps the ask on the ring-package path, names the item, grant, school, and spell surfaces, and does not invent unnecessary platform work.
expectations: Keeps the school path on existing-school wiring rather than new-school expansion

evals.prompt: I want a brand-new frost ring school with its own ring item and spell package. What files and hidden work are involved?
evals.expected_output: Treats the ask as new-school ring work, names school files and contract implications, and routes any deeper platform behavior honestly.
expectations: Calls out types or allowlist implications for new schools
Forces an explicit decision about starter-only versus full ladder and combo-spell scope
Does not pretend the work is only item plus spell content

evals.prompt: Add a new ring whose starter spell needs a brand-new projectile visual.
evals.expected_output: Keeps the ring-package workflow but routes the visual branch through animation-specific surfaces.
expectations: Keeps the answer on the ring-package path
Routes the animation branch to adding-animation or equivalent animation surfaces
Names both ring and spell surfaces
